response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) expertise required for this role. His work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only a brief mention of Java in past roles without context of IDE tooling or JVM internals.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated passion for developer tooling and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills through workshops and public talks
concerns: Lack of proven experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals
No visible involvement with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise build servers
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM ecosystems
